g.title: Active Pipeline executing context switch logic in Ring 0 (Kernel Mode)
Process being descheduled; architecture state saved to PCB_A in kernel memory
Control Register 3: Holds the physical address of the 4KB-aligned PML4 table
Translation Lookaside Buffer: Virtual-to-Physical mapping cache
Root of the hierarchical page table structure for Process B
Incoming process; state restored from PCB_B and TSS

tr.td: Physical address bits of root page table (4KB aligned)
If set, CR3 write does not invalidate TLB entries

div.p: Coherency Invariant: Any change to CR3 without PCID_NO_FLUSH (Bit 63) triggers hardware-mediated invalidation of all non-global TLB entries.

g.title: Atomic hardware operation: loading a new root page table base
First instruction fetch in new address space will typically trigger a TLB miss and Page Walk
